metadata.title: Anthropic Embedded Analytics Evidence Dashboard
metadata.course: ALY 6060 Decision Support and Business Intelligence
metadata.scope: Only Anthropic-published research, reports, and official articles with quantitative data were used.

reports.title: How AI is transforming work at Anthropic
reports.sample: 132 Anthropic engineers and researchers, 53 qualitative interviews, and internal Claude Code usage data
reports.dashboard_use: Internal AI adoption, productivity lift, daily task usage, delegation limits, and workplace risks

reports.title: Agentic coding and persistent returns to expertise
reports.sample: About 400,000 interactive Claude Code sessions from about 235,000 people between October 2025 and April 2026
reports.dashboard_use: Work mode composition, human versus Claude decision split, task value growth, and success by expertise

reports.title: Measuring AI agent autonomy in practice
reports.sample: Millions of human-agent interactions, including Claude Code and public API tool-use data
reports.dashboard_use: Autonomy, auto-approval, safeguards, human-in-the-loop coverage, reversibility, and risk monitoring

reports.title: Anthropic Economic Index report: Learning curves
reports.sample: February 5 to February 12, 2026 Claude usage, including Claude.ai and first-party API samples
reports.dashboard_use: Use case diversification, work versus personal use, task value, geographic concentration, and learning effects

reports.title: Anthropic Education Report: The AI Fluency Index
reports.sample: 9,830 Claude.ai conversations with several back-and-forths during a 7-day window in January 2026
reports.dashboard_use: User fluency behaviors, iteration, evaluation habits, and artifact-related risk

reports.title: Teaching Claude why
reports.sample: Anthropic alignment evaluations and experimental safety training datasets
reports.dashboard_use: Misalignment reduction, safety-training effectiveness, and model governance recommendations

reports.title: Project Fetch: Phase two
reports.sample: Three Claude Opus 4.7 trials on robotic tasks compared with prior Anthropic employee teams
reports.dashboard_use: Agent speed, code volume, reliability, and limits in physical-world tool use

kpis.label: Claude Code sessions
kpis.detail: Interactive sessions in coding expertise report

kpis.label: Fastest robotics speedup
kpis.detail: Opus 4.7 versus no-Claude team on shared tasks

internal_tasks.note: Share of Claude-assisted work employees said they would not have enjoyed doing themselves
Claude-assisted work employees said would not have been done without Claude

economic_index.metric: Top 20 countries share of per-capita usage
Top 10 US states share of usage

recommendations.evidence: Anthropic employees report Claude usage in 59% of daily work and a 50% productivity boost.
recommendations.action: Design BI dashboards that appear inside coding, support, research, and operations workflows instead of requiring separate reporting cycles.

recommendations.priority: Keep human judgment at the planning layer
recommendations.evidence: Claude Code users make about 70% of planning decisions while Claude makes about 80% of execution decisions.
recommendations.action: Let AI automate execution-heavy tasks, but require humans to define goals, constraints, success criteria, and final acceptance.

recommendations.priority: Build oversight telemetry before scaling agents
recommendations.evidence: 80% of public API tool calls appear to have safeguards and 73% have some human-in-the-loop mechanism.
recommendations.action: Track autonomy, risk, reversibility, clarification stops, and human interrupts as operational BI metrics.

recommendations.evidence: Iterative conversations show 2.67 additional fluency behaviors, compared with 1.33 without iteration.
recommendations.action: Train employees to iterate, question reasoning, identify missing context, and verify outputs, especially when artifacts look polished.

recommendations.priority: Treat safety as an implementation metric
recommendations.evidence: Anthropic reduced some misalignment rates sharply by training models on reasoning and constitutional principles.
recommendations.action: Pair productivity dashboards with safety dashboards that show policy violations, escalation rates, reversibility, and audit outcomes.
